docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,681.66 FILED BY SHEA, MARGARET J. AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-21-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEFF APPENROOT (OWNER) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF MARGARET J SHEA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS JEFF APPENROOOT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEA, MARGARET J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUREL REALTY $1,553.42 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,653.42, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: 1,653.42. AS DETAILED BELOW: REPLACEMENT COST: PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL, AS REQUESTED, $1,740.94, IS DENIED. FROM THAT FIGURE $1,257.36 IS DEDUCTED FOR THE COST OF THE NEW COUCH, OTTOMAN, CUSHIONS. THE COURT FINDS THE PURCHASE OF A NEW COUCH, OTTOMAN, CUSHIONS TO BE UNREASONABLE. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT AWARDS PLAINTIFF THE REASONABLE CLEANING COST OF THE ORIGINAL COUCH,OTTOMAN, CUSHIONS IN THE SUM OF $300. TOTAL REPLACEMENT COST AWARD IS: $783.58. EXTRA LAUNDRY DUE TO CO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
